supported_goal: Tell the user the delivery/tracking status of a physical bank card that has already been issued and dispatched, and when to expect it.
included: replacement card shipment (after a lost/stolen report)
estimated delivery date and in-app tracking status
excluded: activating the card once it arrives
requesting or issuing a brand-new card
reporting a card lost or stolen
key_facts: Standard delivery is 5-7 business days from the dispatch date by mail.
Delivery status is tracked in-app under Cards -> Track delivery once the card has shipped.
Expedited delivery (1-2 business days) is available for a $25 fee.

supported_goal: Guide the user through changing the 4-digit PIN on their bank card.
included: changing or updating the card PIN
key_facts: Change the 4-digit card PIN in-app under Cards -> Manage card -> Change PIN, or at any Northwind ATM.
The new PIN takes effect immediately and there is no fee to change it.
The card PIN is separate from the mobile-app login password and the SIM PIN.

supported_goal: Show the user their current credit-card statement (bill) balance and its payment due date.
excluded: available spending balance / remaining credit limit
making a payment on the bill
key_facts: The current statement balance and due date are shown in-app under Payments -> Statement.
Statements are generated on the 1st of each month and payment is due on the 20th.
The minimum payment is the greater of 3% of the statement balance or $25; a $35 late fee applies if the due date is missed.

supported_goal: Explain the foreign-exchange (foreign transaction) fee charged when a card is used for international or foreign-currency transactions.
key_facts: A 2.5% foreign transaction fee applies to any purchase made in a foreign currency or processed outside the country.
Currency is converted at the Visa network exchange rate with no additional bank markup.
Purchases in local currency within the country incur no foreign transaction fee.
The fee is shown as a separate line item on the statement.

supported_goal: Help the user report a lost or stolen card, deactivate it, and order a replacement.
included: permanent deactivation of the compromised card
replacement card with a new card number
excluded: temporarily freezing a card the user still has
a card declined at a merchant
key_facts: Immediately freeze the card in-app (Cards -> Freeze card) or call the 24/7 lost-and-stolen hotline to report it.
Reporting a card lost or stolen permanently deactivates it and issues a replacement with a new card number.
The replacement arrives in 5-7 business days (standard) or 1-2 business days for a $25 expedited fee.
You are not liable for unauthorized transactions made after the card is reported.

supported_goal: Move money between two accounts the user holds at the bank (e.g., checking to savings).
included: internal transfer between the user's own accounts
excluded: transfers to another person or external bank (ACH/wire)
key_facts: Transfers between your own Northwind accounts are instant and free.
Start one in-app under Move money -> Between my accounts.
The daily limit for internal transfers is $25,000.

supported_goal: Explain why a specific card transaction was declined at a merchant and how the user can resolve it.
included: merchant decline reason for a specific transaction
insufficient-funds / daily-limit / expired / frozen / wrong-PIN / international-block causes
excluded: reporting the card lost or stolen
disputing or refunding a completed (posted) charge
key_facts: Common decline reasons are insufficient available funds, a frozen/locked card, an exceeded daily spending limit, an expired card, an incorrect PIN, or blocked international transactions.
For purchases abroad, enable a travel notice in-app so international transactions aren't blocked.
Confirm funds are available and the card isn't frozen, then retry; a fraud-hold decline requires verifying the transaction via the app or the 24/7 hotline.

supported_goal: Guide the user through resetting a forgotten mobile-app login password.
key_facts: On the login screen tap 'Forgot password,' then verify identity with a one-time passcode (OTP) sent to your registered mobile number or email.
Set a new password of at least 8 characters including one number and one symbol; it takes effect immediately.
Resetting the app password signs you out of all other devices and does not change your card PIN.
